programme.desc: Sharks of the Coral Canyon highlights how sharks and coral reefs are intricately linked. programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: The rain simulator is up and running and the results are shocking. But where do we go from here? How do we fix what’s broken and return to farming with Mother Nature and not against it? Wayne Swanson in Chattanooga Tennessee has some answers. This special episode of Farm Hero highlights the important mission American farmers are on tackling to protect and revitalize our soil… with the help of some Swiss Army Bugs.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team kicks things off with Bonnie Lucas of Law Enforcement Specialists, who’s on a mission to scale her police coordination service nationwide—with a game-changing app in the works. Then it’s all about beauty and impact as gallery owner David Beavis shares how his immersive landscape photography is inspiring audiences and fueling plans for expansion. Next, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage breaks down how his firm is helping Americans retire with confidence—no market risk, just guaranteed income for life. Finally, John Feldman introduces Connected & Protected, a tech-forward company keeping seniors and first responders safe across the country.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail circle back with the A-Team to map out growth strategies for Law Enforcement Specialists, whose new app has the potential to scale nationwide through smart media outreach. Kyle Reyes takes a personal interest in guiding the process, while the team also welcomes powerhouse attorney Stephen Geday, bringing sharp legal expertise to the roster. David Beavis Photography explores fresh marketing moves and B2B opportunities with designers, laying the groundwork for a gallery launch in Naples, Florida. Provision Brokerage looks to streamline its legacy with a clear plan forward, while new A-Team member Riggs Eckelberry—pioneering disruptor in the water industry—joins the mission. Finally, the team evaluates how Connected & Protected can expand their safety tech beyond seniors and first responders, reaching hospitals and even children.

programme.title: Desert Bloom
programme.desc: Witness the silent resilience of the California desert. When the rare spring rains arrive, the arid sands of Anza-Borrego transform into a vibrant tapestry of life, featuring close-up cinematography of delicate desert lilies, abrasive cacti blossoms, and vast, sun-drenched horizons. Experience the fleeting, brilliant beauty of the desert as it is momentarily reclaimed by a sea of wildflowers in this immersive, high-definition escape.

programme.title: Journey Through Joshua Tree
programme.desc: Explore a wonderland of unique desert life in "Journey Through Joshua Tree." The Mojave desert of California is home to the unique Joshua Tree forests and sandstone rock formations of Joshua Tree National Park. Enjoy a calming acoustic guitar soundtrack along with the stunning beauty of this desert landscape. Runtime 75 minutes.

programme.title: Arches & Canyonlands

They also react to some proposed rule changes in College Lacrosse, then James Hogan provides an update on the NCAA Transfer Portal. Utah Archers goalie Brett Dobson joins the show for an interview.

programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: S1E1 Skate
programme.desc: This episode features the inspiring story of founders Miguel and Isabel. Driven by the belief that kids should be free to just be kids, #GoProForACause partner SanSkate is making a real difference in their community. Their mission is to provide a safe space for children who enter the workforce at a young age, giving them a chance to set aside their struggles and enjoy skateboarding. The episode also showcases the very best of GoPro skateboarding, featuring incredible talent from Andrew Brophy, Sewa Kroetkov, Madars Apse, and more.

programme.title: S1E2 Skate
programme.desc: Watch the inspiring story of Mike Rogers, an all-around skateboarding star from Cocoa Beach, FL. A regular competitor at top events around the world, including the Vans Pro-Tec Pool Party, Vans Bowl-A-Rama at Bondi Beach, and the Clash at Clairemont, Mike showcases his skill, style, and dedication to the sport. The episode also features Leticia Bufoni and Cata Diaz as she shares her perspective on women in skateboarding and explains why MACBA in Barcelona has become a world-renowned destination for skaters, with its iconic plaza, unique architecture, and perfectly smooth concrete.

programme.title: S1E3 Skate
programme.desc: Experience the very best of GoPro skateboarding at MACBA, Barcelona, celebrated worldwide as the ultimate Spanish skateboarding mecca. In 2018, we teamed up with Macba Life to follow the local skating community and capture the most jaw-dropping tricks this iconic plaza has to offer. Don’t miss this unforgettable collaboration with #MacbaLife.

programme.title: S2E1 Skate
programme.desc: The very best of GoPro skateboarding including pro skateboarders Sean Malto, Chris Cole & Leticia Bufoni.

programme.desc: From learning how to scale a fish to enjoying a cereal inspired cocktail at one of the city’s most storied watering holes, Greg gets a taste of the great cuisine Milwaukee has to offer with Egg and Flour’s owner, Chef Adam Pawlak.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: All in the Family
programme.desc: Patrick Shea, Chef and Owner of CK Pearl and Decklyns in Essex and Gloucester and Chef Kladji Plaku, Chef de Cuisine at City Table, City Barn & Solas in Boston engage in a battle of culinary skill. Will a surprise guest judge change everything?

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: The Mystery of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Known as one of the first cases of the digital age, Maura Murray's mysterious disappearance continues to confound investigators and internet sleuths.
